purpose: Classify modules and define the authoritative active module set

purpose: Project-level state + observable definitions + cross-experiment physics abstraction
notes: Validated/assist tooling exists: repo_state_generator.m and repo_state_validator.m.

purpose: Semantic definitions used by context bundles
outputs: model.core / model.extended embedded into context bundles

purpose: Machine-readable baseline handoff for agents/humans (state + reduced claims)
notes: Contains reduced claim summaries only; evidence links are not embedded.

purpose: Machine-readable extended handoff (state + model.extended + reduced claims)
notes: Recommended semantic entry point in this repo audit.

purpose: Explicit scientific claims with status/role/confidence (+ evidence links in practice)
outputs: claims objects consumed by surveys/snapshot indexers
notes: Snapshot bundle claims are lossy summaries compared to full claim schema.

purpose: Ground truth evidence identity and reproducibility data for each run
notes: Per-run metadata is the evidence source for higher layers.

purpose: Enumerate runs and extract manifest metadata via filesystem scanning
notes: docs/run_system.md mentions run_index.csv/latest_run.txt but those files are not found here.

purpose: Canonical observable vocabulary and physical-name policy (legacy compatibility)
notes: Physical names used in reports; legacy code/CSV remains unchanged.

purpose: Standardize run-root observables.csv schema and aggregate across runs
outputs: run root observables.csv; aggregated multi-run table via load_observables
notes: Acts as a bridge to build cross-run knowledge products.

purpose: Mark each run as approved/pending/etc based on presence of reports (and legacy heuristic)
notes: In this workspace, results/**/run_review.json was not found; rolling surveys exist but regeneration may be blocked.

purpose: Claim-aware rolling synthesis of supported/pending/eligible runs
notes: Rolling surveys exist now; run_review.json missing here suggests regeneration may require recreating run reviews.

purpose: Human-readable evidence narratives and global synthesis reports
notes: Snapshot smart layer uses an index mapping report_id->path.

purpose: Create shareable ZIP snapshots for reproducibility/context sharing
notes: Payload zips are not tracked in git, but scripts implement the packaging behavior.

purpose: Deterministic control-plane mapping claim/analysis/question/observable to evidence runs and report paths
notes: Runpack ZIP payloads referenced by design are not present here; use source_run_path and report paths where available.

purpose: Generate reusable observable metadata catalogs + run-root observable indexes
outputs: tables/* and reports/* within a new run
notes: These are run generators; their outputs are created inside results/<experiment>/runs.

purpose: Human navigation, snapshot inclusion decisions, and private operational notes
notes: `docs/internal/DOCUMENTATION.md` is private/personal notebook; not a shareable knowledge interface.

purpose: Normalize run_id -> evidence tables/reports paths (+ snapshot linkage metadata)
outputs: evidence struct for a given run_id (tables/reports paths + snapshot fields)
notes: Used by query_system for run evidence resolution; completeness depends on registry contents.

system_name: Evidence Query / Evidence Resolution Entry Points
purpose: Seed candidate runs from snapshot edges and rank using existing evidence tables (no recomputation)
outputs: MATLAB struct with ranked candidate runs and resolved evidence paths
notes: Initial query set is scope-limited (e.g., coordinate_selection, residual_validity, pt_vs_relaxation).
